results.rendered_html:
āhartṛ a.
1 One who takes or seizes.
2 Bringing, fetching.
3 Performing; āhartā kratūnāṃ  K. 5. 
4 Causing, bringing on; ātmano vadhamāhartā kvāsau vihagataskaraḥ  V. 5. 1. 
— m.
— (rtā) A copy-holder (in law).
